content.en:
"I also saw a pure purple cocoon on the Forbidden Bug Tree in the Forbidden Zerg Lair, and the two lord-level Forbidden Zerg were guarding the pure purple cocoon. The pure purple cocoon is located at the top of the insect tree, and I guess it may be the insect cocoon of the insect king!"

Ye Tian told his guess.

"What, Worm King!!!"

The Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor were shocked.

The Worm King is comparable to the existence of the Domain Ancestor, once the Worm King is born, the two of them will not be able to block a move together, and they will be killed in an instant.

"Nine Extremes Heavenly King, are you sure?"

Eternal Dao Ancestor asked cautiously.

"Sure!" Ye Tian affirmed.

The Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor were silent, this news was shocking and very surprising to them.

The only good news at the moment is that the insect king's insect cocoon is still in the process of being conceived, as long as the forbidden zerg is hunted vigorously and they are not allowed to have time to find resources, the progress of the forbidden zerg's gestation will be interrupted, and it is a luxury for the insect king to want to breed.

"Nine Extremes Heavenly King, every once in a while, we will let your clone enter the inside of the Forbidden Zerg Lair to learn about the gestation of the Worm King's cocoon, can you agree?" asked the Eternal Dao Ancestor.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian agreed.

He just wanted to copy the forbidden talents of other lord-level forbidden zergs, and if he could meet other lord-level forbidden zergs, then he would make a lot of money.

Therefore, he will naturally agree to such a request.

Knowing the combat power of the Forbidden Zerg, the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor knew in their hearts, at least they would not fall into a desperate situation due to lack of intelligence in the future.

At present, the Forbidden Zerg has eight lord-level Forbidden Zergs, two of which need to protect the Worm King Worm Cocoon, and they will not come out to fight under normal circumstances, unless the Half-Step Domain Ancestors are really about to enter the Forbidden Worm Hive.

In addition, the Forbidden Insect Hive has a lot of pressure on outsiders, and it is not easy to enter, otherwise it is easy to lose your life, it is the base camp of the Forbidden Zerg, and the Forbidden Zerg has a great advantage in fighting there.

Moreover, Ye Tian only explored the Forbidden Insect Tree, and did not fully explore all the circumstances inside the Forbidden Insect Clan's nest, so the current news was only a part, which could be believed, but not completely.

Therefore, Black Wind Mountain still needs to be cautious.

Ye Tian came out of the Eternal Dao Ancestor Mansion, and after he came back, he did not rest, nor did he go to cultivate, but began to fuse two forbidden talents: the Dark Spear.

"Fusion!"

Ye Tian thought in his heart.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying pain struck, as if it had brought Ye Tian back to when he first fused his talent, but he could still bear it.

This time the fusion took a long time, and a full day passed before the fusion finally ended.

Subsequently, Ye Tian fused the second forbidden talent: the Dark Spear, which also took a day.

However, it took him decades to fuse the two forbidden talents into one, and all of this was fused within the Time Array, so it didn't take long for the outside world to pass.

The forbidden talent of the Dark Spear is not just condensed into a Dark Spear like Ye Tian, but it is an indestructible trait, which can be blessed on the Forbidden Spear or on one's own body.

For example, the lord-level forbidden zerg blessed the forbidden talent of the dark spear on his long feet, making the attack power and power of the long feet extremely terrifying, and he could easily penetrate his body, even a half-step domain ancestor would not dare to take the dark spear with a blow.

Ye Tian tried to bless the forbidden talent of the Dark Spear on the Forbidden Spear, which instantly increased the power of the Forbidden Spear by ten times, which meant that Ye Tian's combat power had instantly increased a lot.

Then, he blessed the forbidden spear on his fingers, and one finger could easily pierce through the Dao device.

It's a pity that the Forbidden Spear represents an attack, so it can't bless itself to form a defense.

Of course, using talents directly is the stupidest and least efficient way to do it.

For example, the Dao-level natal talent, if used directly, is not very powerful, and the Dao-level natal talent is mainly to enable practitioners to quickly comprehend the Dao technique.

And the forbidden talent -

"The forbidden talent should correspond to the forbidden Dao technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Forbidden Dao Techniques need to be comprehended by themselves, and other people's Forbidden Dao Techniques are not suitable for themselves, and those who can be qualified to practice Forbidden Dao Techniques are not likely to learn other people's Forbidden Dao Techniques, which will destroy their own Forbidden Dao.

Therefore, the path after the Supreme Dao Ancestor almost requires personal comprehension, and there is no way to teach it, which is why the Invincible Dao Ancestor and the Half-Step Domain Ancestor are so rare.

Although Ye Tian now has a forbidden talent, and his hope of creating a forbidden Dao technique is many times greater than before, it is not something that can be created by just thinking about it, it still takes a long time.

However, with the forbidden talent: the Dark Spear, Ye Tian's combat power has skyrocketed now, which is comparable to the weakest kind of supreme Dao Ancestor, and if he encounters an elite-level forbidden Zerg, he is not without the power to resist.

Ye Tian and Xiao Yue rested at the Black Wind Mountain base for a few months, and learned about the current situation on the battlefield.

Today's battlefield is basically divided into the first-level battlefield of the invincible Dao Ancestors, the second-level battlefield of the strongest Dao Ancestors, and the third-level battlefield of the lower level.

The third-level battlefield is relatively close to the major bases, and the elite-level taboo zerg is extremely rare, after all, the elite-level taboo zerg is basically blocked by the strongest Dao Ancestors, so as not to hunt ordinary Dao Ancestors on a large scale with the elite-level Zerg.

Once the Dao Ancestors fall too much, the Forbidden Zerg can take away the flesh of the Dao Ancestors and return to the Forbidden Zerg lair, cultivating more Forbidden Zerg, which is not a good thing.

this day.

Ye Tian received an order from Black Wind Mountain.

"Nine Extremes Heavenly King, immediately go to the third-level battlefield and intercept a batch of forbidden zergs!"

This is an order from the Wind King.

According to the Wind King, a group of more than three hundred Dao Ancestors were slaughtered, and those Forbidden Zerg returned to the Forbidden Zerg lair with the bodies of three hundred Dao Ancestors, so they had to be stopped on the third-level battlefield.

Otherwise, once this batch of forbidden zergs escapes, they will definitely use these Dao ancestor bodies to cultivate a large number of forbidden zergs.

Of course.

Ye Tian was not the only one who received this order, the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the third-level battlefield also received the news one by one, and they were all the top Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and the ordinary Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors were not qualified to take the task, otherwise they would send corpses if they went.
